sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n103256" key="tessareskaideka/shmos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">τεσσᾰρεσκαιδεκά-σημος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n103256.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">of fourteen time-units</tr_>, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Aristid.</author> </bibl> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Quint.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.14</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
